# сервера выгруженные вручную из подписки hydra 14 июня в 04:00 
# ВАЖНО: uid  нужно менять на uid из подписки спаршенной на сервер (при парсе подписки добавляются инбаунды с одним uid, его и используем!)

{
  "dns" : {
    "queryStrategy" : "UseIPv4",
    "servers" : [
      {
        "address" : "77.88.8.8",
        "detour" : "direct",
        "domains" : [
          "geosite:category-ru",
          "regexp:\\.ru$",
          "regexp:\\.su$",
          "regexp:\\.xn--p1ai$",
          "regexp:\\.moscow$"
        ],
        "queryStrategy" : "UseIPv4",
        "tag" : "direct"
      },
      {
        "address" : "https:\/\/cloudflare-dns.com\/dns-query",
        "detour" : "proxy",
        "queryStrategy" : "UseIPv4"
      },
      {
        "address" : "1.1.1.1",
        "detour" : "direct",
        "queryStrategy" : "UseIPv4",
        "skipFallback" : false
      }
    ]
  },
  "inbounds" : [
    {
      "listen" : "127.0.0.1",
      "port" : 10808,
      "protocol" : "socks",
      "settings" : {
        "auth" : "noauth",

      },

        "destOverride" : [
          "http",

      },

    "loglevel" : "Warning"
  },

    {
      "mux" : {
        "concurrency" : -1,
        "enabled" : true,

      },

        "vnext" : [
          {
            "address" : "nl.north-1winter.cv",

              {
                "encryption" : "none",

                "flow" : "xtls-rprx-vision",

        ]
      },
      "streamSettings" : {
        "network" : "tcp",
        "realitySettings" : {
          "fingerprint" : "firefox",
          "publicKey" : "tszWkJf8EdAkXhxvD-T_xA08SjU_x7lf15lXrPCLVn8",

      "protocol" : "blackhole",
      "tag" : "block"

    "domainMatcher" : "hybrid",
    "domainStrategy" : "IPIfNonMatch",
    "rules" : [

        "ip" : [

{
  "dns" : {
    "queryStrategy" : "UseIPv4",
    "servers" : [
      {
        "address" : "77.88.8.8",
        "detour" : "direct",
        "domains" : [
          "geosite:category-ru"
        ],
        "tag" : "direct"
      },
      {
        "address" : "https:\/\/cloudflare-dns.com\/dns-query",
        "detour" : "proxy"
      },
      {
        "address" : "1.1.1.1",
        "detour" : "direct",
        "skipFallback" : false
      }
    ]
  },
  "inbounds" : [
    {
      "listen" : "127.0.0.1",
      "port" : 10808,
      "protocol" : "socks",
      "settings" : {
        "auth" : "noauth",
        "udp" : true
      },

          "http",

        ],

        "outboundTag" : "direct",
        "type" : "field"
      },
      {
        "domain" : [
          "geosite:category-gov-ru",
          "geosite:yandex",
          "geosite:vk"
        ],
        "outboundTag" : "direct",
        "type" : "field"
      },
      {
        "outboundTag" : "direct",
        "protocol" : [
          "bittorrent"
        ],
        "type" : "field"
      },
      {
        "balancerTag" : "Balancer_WL3",
        "network" : "tcp,udp",
        "type" : "field"
      }
    ]
  }
}

    "pingConfig" : {
      "connectivity" : "",
